caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "YOU NEVER DO SUIT" stands in a room filled with framed pictures on the wall and clothing racks in the background. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. A white mannequin wearing a white shirt is visible behind him to the right. In the lower corners of the scene, there are logos, including one on the left that says "THE" and one on the right that says "BOSS FLEX". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, initially with his eyes closed and a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he slowly opens his eyes and looks slightly to his right, shifting his gaze while remaining still.
